hero.title: ESG scores are slow. The signal isn't.
hero.lead: We track which ASEAN companies are improving their ESG behaviour before ratings agencies catch up. The model scores 198 large-cap companies across Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia and Vietnam, and shows exactly how confident it is in each.
hero.statTitle: Average yearly return gap between the model's top-ranked and bottom-ranked companies, after trading costs.
hero.statLabel: per-year gap: top vs bottom companies (after costs)

idea.title: Find the movement before the score catches up.

cards.title: Lagging scores
cards.body: Static ESG ratings can update after market attention has already shifted.

cards.title: Alternative signals
cards.body: News tone, disclosure behavior, and transition proxies update at a faster tempo.

cards.title: Early entry
cards.body: The model ranks improving companies before they look obvious on static scorecards.

leaderboard.weightSandboxBody: Data coverage is display-only and excluded from the weighted score.
leaderboard.customWeightsBanner: Custom weights - rankings differ from the validated model

methodology.title: Transparent variables, composites, and validation.
methodology.explainer: Plain version: we turn news, company financials and country policy into signals, keep only the ones that pass a strict statistical reliability check, combine the survivors, and test the result on years the model never saw while it was being designed.

risks.title: Limits are part of the product.

cards.title: The net edge isn't proven
cards.body: Before trading costs the signal is real, but after costs the top-vs-bottom gap could still be zero. We report that openly instead of claiming a win.

cards.title: ESG scores went dark
cards.body: Yahoo's free ESG feed died mid-build and the exchange disclosure feed was empty, so the model leans on news sentiment and fundamentals. Licensed ESG data would strengthen it.

cards.title: Research demo, not advice
cards.body: This screens a liquid ASEAN universe for research. It demonstrates method and rigour - it is not investment advice or a live trading product.

footer.sourceNote: Sources, citations, and retrieval dates are placeholders for Claude prose. Built for PolyFinTech100 2026 | CGS International ESG Intelligence.
